title: Zep
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Zep''''' was a pair of [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Towards the end of [[Operation Skyhook]] ''Zep'' group came out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] at one of the Alliance's main weapons-storage compounds. Discovering that the cache was under attack by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|frigate]] ''[[Retsub]]'', they promptly escaped into hyperspace.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
